description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this bag from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. And don't be deceived by its compact look - there's ample space to hold all your essentials! Height: 30 cm Width: 27 cm Made of nylon for durability and comfort One roomy compartment with fabric inner, zippered pocket and organiser pouches inside Two pockets on the front with velcro closure Two handles One zippered pocket at the back Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Brand tab appliquéd on the side Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
